allow: Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute epas-db --remote --command "PRAGMA table_info\(employees\);")
Bash(npx wrangler d1 migrations apply epas-db --local)
Bash(npx wrangler d1 migrations list epas-db --local)
Bash(npx wrangler d1 execute epas-db --local --command "PRAGMA table_info\(employees\);")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""query"":""mutation { upsertEmployee\(input: { id: \\""test-001\\"", employeeCode: \\""EMP-001\\"", firstName: \\""Бат\\"", lastName: \\""Дорж\\"", firstNameEng: \\""Bat\\"", lastNameEng: \\""Dorj\\"", email: \\""bat@company.mn\\"", department: \\""Engineering\\"", branch: \\""HQ\\"", level: \\""L2\\"", hireDate: \\""2026-03-10\\"", status: \\""ACTIVE\\"", numberOfVacationDays: 15, isKpi: true }\) { employee { id firstName lastName firstNameEng email numberOfVacationDays isKpi } resolvedAction triggeredActionResult { documents { id documentName } auditLog { id action } } } }""}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8787/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "x-actor-id: test-user" -H "x-actor-role: admin" -d '{""query"":""{ actions { id name phase triggerFields } }""}')
